index.description: The position of the product in the request body.
The position of the product in the request body.

DspDeleteProductConversionTrackingV1Resp.description: The update or delete operation response. If everything is successful, the errors array is omitted. If everything fails, the success array is omitted.

nextToken.description: Operations that return paginated results include a pagination token in this field. To retrieve the next page of results, call the same operation and specify this token in the request. If the nextToken field is empty, there are no further results.

DspPostProductConversionTrackingV1Respon.description: The update or delete operation response. If everything is successful, the errors array is omitted. If everything fails, the success array is omitted.

ProductAssociationType.description: A featured ASIN is a specific product that’s promoted in creatives within this campaign. Tracking non-featured ASINs or variations, in addition to featured and parent ASINs, will ensure proper conversion metrics and prevent data loss that is not recoverable once a campaign starts.

ProductDomainGet.description:
The Amazon domain where the ASIN is sold. This should be where you are running your campaign.

To track ASINs across multiple geographies, each ASIN must be added once per domain.

ProductDomainUpdate.description:
The Amazon domain where the ASIN is sold. This should be where you are running your campaign.

To track ASINs across multiple geographies, each ASIN must be added once per domain.

get.description:
Gets the conversion tracking products for a given campaign.

**Authorized resource type**:
DSP Rodeo Entity ID, DSP Advertiser Account ID

**Parameter name**:
Amazon-Ads-AccountId

**Parameter in**:
header

**Requires one of these permissions**:
["campaign_view"]

parameters.description: Operations that return paginated results include a pagination token in this field. To retrieve the next page of results, call the same operation and specify this token in the request. If the nextToken field is empty, there are no further results. Token expires 59 seconds after last call.
parameters.name: nextToken

schema.description: Operations that return paginated results include a pagination token in this field. To retrieve the next page of results, call the same operation and specify this token in the request. If the nextToken field is empty, there are no further results. Token expires 59 seconds after last call.

parameters.description:
Sets the maximum number of objects in the returned array. Use in conjunction with the nextToken parameter to control pagination. For example, supplying maxResults=20 with a previously returned token will fetch up to the next 20 items. In some cases, fewer items may be returned.
Default: 10000
parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description:
Sets the maximum number of objects in the returned array. Use in conjunction with the nextToken parameter to control pagination. For example, supplying maxResults=20 with a previously returned token will fetch up to the next 20 items. In some cases, fewer items may be returned.
Default: 10000
